# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Please check this section to know which versions are currently supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| v1.x    | :white_check_mark: |
| < v1.0  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Jasynthex, please DO NOT open a public issue.

Instead, please send an e-mail or direct message to the maintainer(s). Security issues will be treated with the highest priority and will be resolved as quickly as possible. You should expect a response within 48 hours.

Include the following information in your report:
- Type of issue (e.g. denial of service, remote code execution)
- Full paths of source file(s) related to the manifestation of the issue
- The location of the affected source code (tag/branch/commit or direct URL)
- Any special configuration required to reproduce the issue
- Step-by-step instructions to reproduce the issue
- Proof of concept or exploit code (if possible)
- Impact of the issue, including how an attacker might exploit the issue
